# podfly

> Deploy Serverpod on existing cloud infrastructure via each provider’s CLI.
> Not a host — orchestrates fly, wrangler, neonctl, etc., and encodes config quirks.

## Start here

- [README](README.md) — mission, provider roadmap, quick start
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — agent rules and decision tree
- [docs/guide.md](docs/guide.md) — commands, flags, automation, troubleshooting
- [docs/podfly.yaml.md](docs/podfly.yaml.md) — full config reference

## Core docs

- [docs/caching.md](docs/caching.md) — Flutter web WASM, service worker, Cache-Control
- [docs/database.md](docs/database.md) — none / sqlite / fly_postgres / neon + detection
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md) — docs index
- [docs/specs/2026-07-18-podfly-design.md](docs/specs/2026-07-18-podfly-design.md) — design history

## Examples

- [examples/mobile_api_only](examples/mobile_api_only) — Serverpod mini, android+ios only, API-only deploy

## Default commands (copy-paste)

```bash
# Install
dart pub global activate --source git https://github.com/127thousand/podfly.git

# After serverpod create (or in existing Serverpod monorepo)
podfly deploy --yes --smoke

# Plan only
podfly deploy --yes --dry-run --no-login

# API only (mobile clients)
podfly deploy --api --yes --smoke

# Checks
podfly doctor
podfly smoke
```

## Supported today

| Layer | Providers |
|-------|-----------|
| API | Fly.io (`fly`) |
| UI | Cloudflare Pages (`wrangler`) when `mode: split` + `web.enabled` |
| DB | none, sqlite (+ volume), fly_postgres, neon |

Planned: Railway, Render, Cloud Run, AWS, Azure, DigitalOcean; Supabase / RDS / Cloud SQL / etc.

## Hard rules for agents

1. Prefer Serverpod’s `*_server/Dockerfile` — do not invent Python or random images.
2. Build Flutter web inside the Flutter package (podfly does this).
3. Template Serverpod auth ≠ needs Postgres (soft warning only).
4. No `web/` + android/ios → API-only (`web.enabled: false`).
5. Podfly auto-creates Fly apps and sanitizes names (`_` → `-`).

## Package

- Binary: `podfly`
- Repo: https://github.com/127thousand/podfly
- Skill: `.grok/skills/podfly/SKILL.md` (also installable under `~/.grok/skills/podfly/`)
